  • weekly picks (Jun 2 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 June 2nd week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    06/10

    1. s41467-026-74120-x A generalist biomedical vision-language model via multi-CLIP knowledge distillation (Nature Communications)

    2. s41567-026-03303-6 Spinon mediation of witness spin dynamics in herbertsmithite (Nature Physics)

    3. s41567-026-03333-0 Observation of exact quantum critical states (Nature Physics)

    4. s41567-026-03325-0 Bilayer excitons in the Laughlin fractional quantum Hall state (Nature Physics)

    5. s41598-026-55199-0 Physics-informed neural networks with caputo-fabrizio derivatives for nonlinear fractal-fractional delay equations and chaotic systems (Scientific Reports)

    6. s41598-026-57429-x Research on the pathways through which rural large-scale sporting events enhance the well-being of local residents—a grounded theory study based on Guizhou, China (Scientific Reports)

    7. s41598-026-54918-x Regression based hybrid machine learning model performance evaluation on air quality index prediction in Kolkata (Scientific Reports)

    8. j3s5-gjpf Exotic Critical States as Fractional Fermi Seas in the One-Dimensional Bose Gas (PRL)

    9. wzcr-m8xb Real-Time Sign-Problem-Suppressed Quantum Monte Carlo Algorithm for Noisy Quantum Circuit Simulations (PRL)

    10. 49gt-msw9 Coupling a $^{73}\mathrm{Ge}$ Nuclear Spin to an Electrostatically Defined Quantum Dot in Silicon (PRL)

    11. g22y-z8h3 Adaptable Route to Fast Coherent State Transport via Bang-Bang-Bang Protocols (PRL)

    12. p5c7-m43d Unveiling Light-Quark Yukawa Flavor Structure via Dihadron Fragmentation at Lepton Colliders (PRL)

    13. gvxl-vxd4 New Ground State in $^{149}\mathrm{La}$ Removes Two-Neutron-Separation-Energy Anomaly in Lanthanum Isotopes (PRL)

    14. vpny-23wq Search for Double Beta Decays of $^{134}\mathrm{Xe}$ with EXO-200 Phase II (PRL)

    15. tfdm-qshs Momentum-Resolved Two-Dimensional Spectroscopy as a Probe of Nonlinear Quantum Field Dynamics (PRL)

    16. qlvv-r93m Efimov Effect in Ultracold Microwave-Shielded Polar Molecules (PRL)

    17. ng1d-6gb8 Pound-Drever-Hall Method for Superconducting-Qubit Readout (PRL)

    18. yhk9-qf8c Electrical Switching of Strain Gradients and 90° Domain Walls via Hidden Polar-Acoustic Coupling in ${\mathrm{PbTiO}}_{3}$ (PRL)

    19. fgt6-bhmq Proper Theory of Magnon Orbital Angular Momentum at Equilibrium (PRL)

    24. kqxb-y7p9 Metabolic quantum limit to the information capacity of magnetoencephalography (PRR)

    26. zgvb-cfpg Mathematical model of the amoeba-inspired combinatorial optimization machine for physical implementation and its equivalence to recurrent neural networks (PRR)
